top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END) AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) IN ('2010', '2011');

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END) AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) IN ('2010', '2011');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) AS count_2011,
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) AS count_2010,
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END) AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) IN ('2010', '2011') 
  AND Name = 'Student';

WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) IN ('2010', '2011')

FROM badges
WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) IN ('2010', '2011')

    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) AS count_2011,

final.sql:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END)) * 100.0 / COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 END) AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) IN ('2010', '2011');
